suspendedDesc: Outstanding balance: {amount} ZEC. Pay to restore service.
pastDueDesc: Outstanding: {amount} ZEC. Invoice/product creation is blocked until paid.

overview.noInvoicesYet: No invoices yet. Create your first pay link to get started.

products.title: Product Catalog
products.subtitle: Create products and pricing for your store. Each product gets a unique checkout link.
products.nameHelp: Name of the product or service, visible to customers at checkout.
products.slugHelp: Auto-generated from name. Used in checkout URLs. Only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
products.descHelp: Appears at checkout below the product name. Optional.
products.oneTimeHelp: Charge a single payment for this product.
products.recurringHelp: Charge on a recurring schedule. An invoice will be generated each billing period.
products.priceHelp: The amount to charge in the selected fiat currency. Converted to ZEC at checkout.
products.addPriceByCurrencyHelp: Add pricing in another currency. Customers choose which currency to pay in.
products.metadataHelp: Store additional structured information for your own use. Not shown to customers.
products.noProducts: No products yet. Add your first product above.
products.appearsAtCheckout: Appears on the checkout page below the product name.
products.noPricesYet: No prices yet. Add one to enable checkout.
products.noPricesActive: No active prices. Click EDIT PRODUCT to add one.
products.toastAtLeastOnePrice: Product must have at least one price

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Track payments, create one-time payment links, and manage refunds.
invoices.refundInstructions: Send ZEC to this address to refund the buyer, then mark as refunded.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Track transaction fees, billing cycles, and payment history.
billing.selfHosted: This instance is running in self-hosted mode. No transaction fees are applied.
billing.noCycle: No active billing cycle yet. A cycle starts when your first invoice is confirmed.
billing.belowMinimum: Below the {min} ZEC minimum. Fees carry over automatically until the threshold is reached.
billing.howItWorksDesc: A {rate}% fee is added as a second output in payment QR codes (ZIP 321). When buyers scan the QR, the fee is auto-collected. If a buyer copies the address manually, the fee accrues and is billed at cycle end. Consistent on-time payment upgrades your trust tier, extending billing cycles and grace periods.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your store configuration, API credentials, and security settings.
settings.displayCurrencyHelp: Controls how fiat amounts and ZEC rates are displayed across the dashboard. Does not affect product prices or invoice amounts.
settings.emailChangeHelp: Enter a new email to replace the current one.
settings.emailAddHelp: Add an email to recover your account if you lose your dashboard token.
settings.derivedAddressHelp: Auto-derived from your UFVK. Each invoice gets its own unique payment address for privacy and reliable detection.
settings.webhookUrlHelp: CipherPay will POST invoice events (confirmed, expired) to this URL.
settings.webhookSecretHelp: The full secret is only shown once when generated. Copy it immediately — it cannot be retrieved later.
settings.apiKeysHelp: Keys are shown once when generated. Regenerating invalidates the old key immediately.
settings.dangerDesc: Permanently delete your account, products, and all data. This cannot be undone. You must settle any outstanding billing balance before deleting.
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.
settings.confirmDelete2: This will delete ALL your products, invoices, and billing data. Type OK to confirm.
settings.confirmRemoveEmail: Remove your recovery email? You won't be able to recover your account if you lose your dashboard token.
settings.confirmRegenApiKey: Regenerate your API key? The current key will stop working immediately. Any integrations using it will break.
settings.confirmRegenDashToken: Regenerate your dashboard token? You will be logged out of all sessions and need the new token to log back in.
settings.confirmRegenWebhook: Regenerate your webhook secret? You'll need to update the secret in your integrations.
settings.toastApiKeyRegen: API key regenerated. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
settings.toastDashTokenRegen: Dashboard token regenerated. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.

x402.title: x402 Verifications
x402.subtitle: HTTP 402 payment verifications from your API integrations.

pos.title: POS // Point of Sale
pos.subtitle: Create invoices in-person. Select products, set quantities, and generate a checkout.
pos.addProductsFirst: Add products first to use POS.
pos.mixedCurrency: Mixed currencies in cart. Remove items until all are the same currency.

refundModal.title: Confirm Refund
refundModal.description: This will mark the invoice as REFUNDED. This action cannot be undone. If you have sent ZEC back to the buyer, paste the transaction ID below as proof.
refundModal.txidPlaceholder: Paste the txid of your refund transaction
